subcodes.first_line: The essence of praise and its purest expression, both its outward and inward reality, beseem and are worthy of the hallowed court of the Intended One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جوهر حمد و ساذج حمد و ظاهر آن و باطن آن ساحت قدس حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست
subcodes.subjects: @alchemy; the elixir, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @unity of existence [wahdatu'l-wujud], @transcendence; unknowability of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
